headline: Chip stocks surge, oil slides closer to $80 on US-Iran deal, Fox to acquire Roku
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma comes on Market Domination to further discuss today's biggest headlines, including memory chip stocks like Micron Technology (MU) surging as Wall Street leans more bullish on the AI trade, oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F) moving closer to $80 per barrel on news of a US-Iran peace deal, and media giant Fox (FOX, FOXA) striking a deal to acquire Roku (ROKU) for $22 billion.

headline: SpaceX Options Launch After $1.765 Trillion IPO Valuation
summary: SpaceX options begin trading Tuesday after shares opened at $150, above the $135 IPO price.

raw.headline: SpaceX Options Launch After $1.765 Trillion IPO Valuation
raw.summary: SpaceX options begin trading Tuesday after shares opened at $150, above the $135 IPO price.

headline: SpaceX IPO shines a light on the product set to disrupt Wall Street
summary: Perp market traders had a form of early access to SpaceX, and the trading closely aligned with later prices in the stock market.

raw.headline: SpaceX IPO shines a light on the product set to disrupt Wall Street

headline: The First 2X SpaceX ETF Gained 56% on Day One
summary: The Defiance 2X Space ETF (SPCL) repositioned around SpaceX before its debut and gained 56% before the ETF entered a trading halt.
